info.name: User Management Engine API Collection
info.description:
Postman Collection for AndrexCodes/User-Management-Engine.

This collection maps all HTTP routes exposed by the Express application, including standard user authentication, session-based account profile updates, general routes, and third-party API integration proxies and AI demos (Groq Vision, LLM Classifier, RAG, AI Agent Chat). 

### CSRF Protection & Lusca Middleware
Most POST/PUT requests are guarded by `lusca.csrf` middleware. In Postman, you will need to:
1. Send a `GET` request to `/login` or the respective page to initialize the session and extract the `_csrf` token.
2. Pass the `_csrf` token in either the form body as `_csrf` or the headers under `X-CSRF-Token`.
3. Make sure Postman is configured to allow/store cookies (enabled by default).

item.name: 1. Authentication
item.description: All routes regarding sign in, sign up, magic links, two-factor authentication (2FA), WebAuthn passwordless authentication, and forgot/reset password flows.

request.description: Returns the HTML page containing the sign-in form. Also initializes a session and sets the CSRF cookie.

urlencoded.description: The email of the registering/registered user
CSRF Token retrieved from the GET form

request.description: Submit email and password to log in.
Validates a magic login link token sent to user's email.
Renders the 2FA form where the user enters the security code sent to their email.

urlencoded.description: The 6-digit verification code sent to email

request.description: Validates the email security code to complete login.
Triggers email resend for the 2FA code.
Renders the TOTP (Google Authenticator) verification screen.
Submit Google Authenticator code.
Initiates a passwordless passkey login and returns credential assertion options.
Submit a WebAuthn login assertion credential back to the server to verify and establish session.
Renders user registration form.
Creates a new user profile.
Renders forgot password request form.
Requests a password reset token to be emailed to the specified address.
Renders password update form for reset token.
Saves the newly specified password.
Closes the current session and clears cookies.
Fetch a valid CSRF token from the server to use in decoupled/SPA client POST/PUT/DELETE requests.

item.name: 2. User Account Management
item.description: Endpoints accessible only to authenticated users, facilitating account security, email verification, OAuth unlinking, MFA (email/app), WebAuthn devices, and data deletion.

request.description: Requests an email verification token be sent to user's registered address.
Verifies user email using token parameter.
Renders user profile settings page showing details, connected logins, and security configuration options.
Updates non-sensitive profile parameters.
Changes the current user's password.
Enables 2FA via security codes sent to the registered email.
Disables email 2FA.
Fetches QR code URI and secret key required to register Google Authenticator or other TOTP app.

urlencoded.description: The current code displayed by the TOTP application for verification

request.description: Submits initial TOTP code to confirm registration is correct and activates authenticator app MFA.
Disables and removes TOTP app MFA from user's account.
Initiates passkey creation/binding flow for the currently signed-in user.
Submits device attestation back to server to store the device credentials.
Deletes a registered passkey device from the account.

variable.description: OAuth provider to unlink (e.g. google, github, facebook, twitch, microsoft, discord, etc.)

request.description: Removes OAuth access credentials linking from user profile.
Revokes and cleans up all active session cookies and keys associated with user from MongoDB sessions storage.
Irreversibly deletes the signed-in user's profile, including their registered credentials and metadata.

item.name: 3. General Pages
item.description: Root level pages including contact submission.

request.description: Sends message using SMTP configuration.

item.name: 4. API Integration Proxies
item.description: Contains proxy wrappers of various modern external services (Stripe, Twilio, NYT, Last.fm, HERE Maps, Lob, PubChem, Wiki, Giphy, PayPal, etc.).

request.description: Requires OAuth Steam login. Fetches active achievement stats.
Requires authenticated Tumblr OAuth session.
Requires linked Facebook OAuth credentials.
If user is logged in via GitHub, returns their active repository events. Otherwise falls back to safe client API instances.
Requires linked Twitch OAuth session. Searches active broadcaster game information.
Uploads any file using Multer diskStorage memory handler. Note: CSRF is handled internally by Multer sequencing.

item.name: 5. AI Integration Demos
item.description: Endpoints dedicated to artificial intelligence integrations including natural language department classification, vision analysis, PDF RAG engines, and conversational AI agents.

urlencoded.value: I haven't received my refund of $50 for order #48291 even though it was cancelled 10 days ago.
urlencoded.description: The customer service text message to classify

request.description: Uses Groq and LLM system prompts to categorize consumer messages into departments (e.g. Returns and Refunds, Order Tracking, etc.) returning a classified department value.

formdata.description: The photo captured from device camera to describe.

request.description: Processes camera capture images using Groq Vision model and describes contents.
Lists currently indexed files in vector database chunks collection.

Triggers document ingestion pipeline scanning `/rag_input` directory for raw PDF documents, splitting them into RecursiveCharacterTextSplitter chunks, embedding them with Hugging Face models, and storing them in MongoDB Atlas vector collections.

urlencoded.description: The domain specific knowledge base query question

request.description: Converts question text into vector embeddings, performs Cosine similarity search over Atlas chunks collection, compiles prompt context, and retrieves a comparison response of standard non-grounded LLM vs RAG augmented grounded LLM answers.
Loads past conversation context from MongoDBSaver checkpointer and serves chat UI.

Submits a conversational chat message to the e-commerce client agent. Response is streamed back to client in real-time Server-Sent Events (SSE) format, performing automated agentic reasoning, checking databases, generating refund identifiers, and escalating to Tier 2 support if needed.
Clears conversation history checkpoints from MongoDB checkpointer collection.
